const fs = require('fs') const JSON5 = require('./') // eslint-disable-next-line node/no-deprecated-api require.extensions['.json5'] = function (module, filename) { const content = fs.readFileSync(filename, 'utf8') try { module.exports = JSON5.parse(content) } catch (err) { err.message = filename + ': ' + err.message throw err } }
